mapper.select: SELECT wo.order_id, wo.product_id, COALESCE(p.product_name, wo.product_id) AS product_name, wo.status, wo.shortage_status, wo.due_date, wo.order_qty, wo.updated_at FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_id = wo.product_id WHERE wo.order_id = #{orderId} AND wo.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT CASE WHEN wo.status IN ('IN_PROGRESS','COMPLETED') THEN wo.status WHEN wo.status = 'READY' THEN 'READY' WHEN wo.status = 'WAITING' AND wo.shortage_status = 'CHECKED' THEN 'CHECKED_ONLY' WHEN wo.status = 'WAITING' AND wo.shortage_status = 'DRAFTED' THEN 'PO_PLACED' WHEN wo.status = 'WAITING' AND wo.shortage_status = 'NONE' THEN 'PLANNED' ELSE 'PLANNED' END AS ai_stage FROM work_order wo WHERE wo.order_id = #{workOrderId}
